title: Rich Creamy Spanish All Purpose Flour Stir-fry
description: A rich and creamy dish featuring all purpose flour, perfect for a hangover cure in the morning.
instructions: In a large skillet over medium heat, add the all-purpose flour and cook until lightly golden.
Add minced garlic and chopped onion to the skillet. Cook for about 2-3 minutes or until fragrant.
Pour in chicken stock and stir continuously for 5-6 minutes, scraping any stuck bits from the bottom of the pan.
Slowly pour in heavy cream while stirring constantly to avoid lumps. Allow mixture to simmer for another 10 minutes until sauce thickens slightly.
Season with salt and pepper according to taste.
